title: Zebby's Midnight Patrol Log
text:
## Midnight Patrol Log

**Officer:** Zebby, black kitten

**Route:** From the {place} to the {adjective} window, across {number} forbidden {plural noun}.

**Suspicious item:** One {color} {object} making a {sound} near the {food} bowl.

**Action taken:** Zebby {past-tense verb} behind the {place}, then {past-tense verb} at the item with a {adjective} {body part}.

**Witness statement:** Violet the head cat looked {emotion}; Matilda tried to {verb}.

**Conclusion:** Patrol successful, pending {verb ending in -ing} at dawn and an apology to Violet.
